name: resynth_module
short_description: Run synthesis to optimize a supplied verilog module
full_help:
resynth_module

Description: 
Run synthesis to optimize a supplied verilog module

Syntax: 
resynth_module  [-input <arg>] [-output <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
opt_design

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-input]    Input file name - Verilog file containing module to optimize
  [-output]   Output file name - Verilog file created containing optimized 
              module
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Tools

arguments.description: Input file name - Verilog file containing module to optimize
Output file name - Verilog file created containing optimized module
Suspend message limits during command execution
